div1.entryFree: Husks, the rind or hull of seeds, chaff: h. wherein the acorn cradled, Tp. I, 2, 463. eat h. with your hogs, As I, 1, 40. eating draff and h. H4A IV, 2, 38. the shales and h. of men, H5 IV, 2, 18. what's past and what's to come is strewed with h. and formless ruin of oblivion, Troil. IV, 5, 166.
